commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a separate 10s max event-loop delay threshold, resets diagnostic queueDepth to zero when a session becomes idle, and adds focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main uses the same 1,000ms threshold for P99 and max event-loop delay, and idle transitions only decrement queueDepth by one. A session with two queued records followed by one idle transition is enough to show the stale queue-depth path.
commands.review_followup: Human follow-up is needed for proof that exercises the changed runtime behavior and for maintainer validation on current main; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair because the patch itself is already focused.

target.title: fix: tune diagnostic liveness and idle queue depth
target.author: sevenvista7
